prompt: A clean editorial fashion concept board on a pale powder-blue background with a minimalist green monochrome palette, combining 4 full-body lifestyle photos of the same youth streetwear tennis-inspired character arranged in a horizontal layout. On the far left, a tall vertical photo panel partially overlaps the background, showing a standing model in an oversized light gray-blue Nike windbreaker, mint green shorts, white crew socks, and white sneakers, holding a white tennis racket at their side and a small mint towel or accessory in the other hand. The character’s head is replaced by a large white doodle coffee-cup face icon with a smiling expression and ruler-like tick marks across the top rim. To the right are 3 rounded-rectangle photo panels, evenly spaced. In panel 1, the model sits in a folding chair reading a magazine and holding a green mug, with a dark Nike duffel bag on the floor and a few scattered cups nearby; the white doodle cup head has 2 steam squiggles rising above it. In panel 2, the model stands beside a pyramid made of approximately 28 stacked green and white paper cups, one arm resting on the top; they wear a soft green Nike T-shirt and shorts set, white socks, and white sneakers; a small white typographic logo in the upper left reads like a cafe or service-court brand mark. The doodle cup head here is a simple smiling cup with a wide rim. In panel 3, the model leans casually with crossed legs, holding a green cup, next to a small wire cart containing green tennis balls and topped with a retro CRT television; they wear a white polo shirt, mint shorts, white socks, and white sneakers. The doodle cup head in this panel has horizontal stripe bands across the top. Keep all faces fully replaced by the graphic cup icons, with no real facial features visible. Use a soft studio setup, flat even lighting, subtle shadows, matte textures, and a highly consistent mint, sage, olive, and white color story. Add thin white horizontal guide lines across the blue background near the top and bottom. Place small gray editorial footer text at the bottom: on the left, “MJ REFERENCE”; on the right, “KREA // GPT 2”. Overall style: premium streetwear campaign moodboard, playful surreal branding, minimalist graphic design, polished commercial photography, high consistency across all 4 looks.
